answer: LangGraph is a graph-based orchestration framework designed for building deterministic and agentic LLM workflows. It supports explicit nodes, conditional edges, persistent state, retries, and human-in-the-loop checkpoints [langgraph_overview.md|8dde1ab83ae288bb140d3e956e03b2a232205ab8b2bce0ecd574d3be7ea67afd].
